title: About the Club

homepagePromo.title: Community
homepagePromo.text: Friendly, inclusive and welcoming, with qualified coaches and run leaders supporting club activity.

heroIntro: Fenland Running Club is based in Wisbech, Cambridgeshire. The club is welcoming, community-focused and aims to help and encourage runners regardless of ability.
peopleIntro: Placeholder committee, coach and run leader records are included so the club can add approved details later.
